## Describe the Bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Connect wallet at '...'
2. Select challenge '...'
3. Click '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened.

## Screenshots / Console Errors

If applicable, add screenshots or paste browser console output here.

```
paste console errors here
```

## Environment

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| OS | e.g. Windows 11, macOS 14 |
| Browser | e.g. Chrome 124, Firefox 125 |
| Phantom Wallet Version | e.g. 24.x |
| Solana Network | Devnet |

## Additional Context

Any other context about the problem (e.g., only happens on mobile, only after staking).
